text:
It was just another quiet evening. Luna woke up feeling rested. Today she planned to visit the library. She had a strange desire to learn about flying. Nothing about birds, though.

At the library she browsed through books. Every tome seemed dry. Then she stumbled upon an old illustrated book. Its pages seemed a little faded. But it had gorgeous sketches!

She leaned closer. Stars!

She borrowed it. An old pilot. Why did he soar? Maybe he searched for something. She imagined him finding home. She liked that.

Later she flew his antics. Maybe. Maybe she'd pretend. Cute.

She walked out.
